/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libbooster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libbooster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/booster_msgs/msg/binary_data__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/booster_msgs/msg/rpc_req_msg__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/booster_msgs/msg/rpc_resp_msg__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/booster/Workspace/robocup_demo/build/booster_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libbooster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
